Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter becomes involved with a beautiful model he suspects of complicity in a jewelry robbery.
Video.title: Waiting For Mr. Wrong

Video.summary: Hibbs is tempted by a mobster's money when his wife needs surgery to save her eyesight.
Video.title: Who Do You Trust?

Video.summary: A star high-school hockey player and friend of the Scali family - becomes a prime drug-ring suspect.
Video.title: The Puck Stops Here

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pursue a convicted murderer who is free and has vowed to kill the jurors who convicted him.
Video.title: Guilty

Video.summary: Hunter pursues a package bomber whose ruthless methods are being used to kill the participants in his trial.
Video.title: Blow-Up

Video.summary: Hunter helps a policeman who is framed for the murder of his wife.
Video.title: Think Blue

Video.summary: Tony attempts to protect an informant from a mysterious hit man.
Video.title: Shoot The Breeze

Video.summary: After he shoots a woman in a drunken domestic squabble, Officer Kelly becomes the victim of a campaign.
Video.title: Officer April

Video.summary: As Tony faces a long recovery from his gunshot wounds, a cop is killed.
Video.title: Against The Wind, Part 1

Video.summary: A contract killer makes hits throughout the city in order to ingratiate himself with a criminal kingpin.
Video.title: The Last Kill

Video.summary: Tony discovers a family friend working as a prostitute; David is caught pirating cable TV programs.
Video.title: Working Girls

Video.summary: Tony's former partner seeks revenge for a long jail sentence.
Video.title: Revenge

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall realize they're attracted to each other as they protect an endangered witness.
Video.title: The Big Fall

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall work to stop a brigade of suburban mercenaries plotting to break a drug dealer out of prison
Video.title: War Zone

Video.summary: Tony is enraged as a publicity-seeking "video vigilante" metes out punishment to offenders.
Video.title: Video Vigilante

Video.summary: Tony uncovers the shakedown ofa community of illegal immigrants; David wants an earring to impress a girl.
Video.title: Born In The USA

Video.summary: Paulie's tries to use her son's kidnapping to win back a former girlfriend.
Video.title: Nancy With The Laughing Face

Video.summary: As the search for a cop killer intensifies, Tony begins to doubt his own recovery.
Video.title: Against The Wind, Part 2

Video.summary: Tony and Paulie investigate a puzzling arson case.
Video.title: Sex, Lies, and Kerosene

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall are given 72 hours to find an attorney who falsified his death.
Video.title: Burned

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby must rely on their maternal instincts when they find a baby left on their doorstep.
Video.title: Baby Makes Three

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby follow a bounty to New York City and experience the perils of being tourists while they track their quarry.
Video.title: Hound Downtown

Video.summary: After a nearly fatal accident, Reno loses his memory--and doesn't realize that Dixon is about to visit him in his hospital room.
Video.title: Stationary Target

Video.summary: Reno finds himself in the Old West when he encounters trouble in a ghost town.
Video.title: Rio Reno

Video.summary: Reno takes refuge in a commune but discovers an explosive situation there.
Video.title: Paradise Lost
